requirement: Order matching, trade creation, position updates, Kafka events, unit tests

tasks.title: Types + matching engine + trade creation
tasks.description:
Add Trade/Position types and implement the securities matching engine with trade creation.

Part A — Add types to src/securities-service/internal/types/types.go:
- SecurityTrade struct: ID string, BuyOrderID string, SellOrderID string, InstrumentID string, Price float64, Quantity int, TradeDate string, SettlementDate string (T+2), Status string, CreatedAt string — all with json tags
- Position struct: ID string, ParticipantID string, InstrumentID string, Quantity int, AvgCost float64, MarketValue float64, UnrealizedPnl float64, UpdatedAt string — all with json tags
- TradeStatus enum: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SETTLED, FAILED

Part B — Add store interfaces to src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go:
- TradeStore interface: Create(*SecurityTrade) error, Get(id string) (*SecurityTrade, error), ListByInstrument(instrumentID string) ([]SecurityTrade, error)
- PositionStore interface: GetOrCreate(participantID, instrumentID string) (*Position, error), Update(*Position) error, List(participantID string) ([]Position, error)
- InMemoryTradeStore and InMemoryPositionStore implementations

Part C — Create matching engine at src/securities-service/internal/engine/engine.go:
- MatchingEngine struct with: instrumentStore, orderStore, tradeStore, positionStore
- MatchOrder(order *SecurityOrder) ([]SecurityTrade, error) method:
  1. Get instrument (validate ACTIVE)
  2. Get all resting orders for same instrument on opposite side, sorted by price-time priority:
     - BUY side resting: descending price, ascending time (best bid first)
     - SELL side resting: ascending price, ascending time (best ask first)
  3. For LIMIT orders: match if incoming buy price >= resting sell price, or incoming sell price <= resting buy price
  4. For MARKET orders: match against best available price immediately
  5. On each match: create SecurityTrade with trade_date=today, settlement_date=today+2 business days, price=resting order price, quantity=min(incoming remaining, resting qty)
  6. Update matched orders: decrement remaining qty, set FILLED if fully matched, PARTIALLY_FILLED if partial
  7. Update positions: buyer gets +quantity, seller gets -quantity via PositionStore.GetOrCreate + Update
  8. If incoming order has remaining qty after matching, store as resting order (PENDING)
  9. Return list of trades created

Keep it simple — no auction mode, no iceberg orders, no stop triggers. Just price-time priority continuous matching.

Part D — Wire into order submission:
- Update src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_order.go handleSubmitOrder:
  After storing the order, call engine.MatchOrder(order). If trades are created, return them in the response alongside the order.
- Update Server struct to hold the MatchingEngine
- Update main.go to create MatchingEngine with all stores

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Kafka events for trade execution
tasks.description:
Add channel-based Kafka event publishing for trade execution, following the template pattern from src/matching-engine/internal/kafka/.

Read src/matching-engine/internal/kafka/event.go for the event envelope pattern.
Read src/matching-engine/internal/kafka/producer.go for the Producer interface and ChannelProducer.
Read .softhouse/patterns.md — pattern says: 'channel-based Producer/Consumer interfaces with zero external dependencies'

Create src/securities-service/internal/kafka/ package:

1. event.go — Event envelope struct: ID, Type, Source, Timestamp, Data (interface{}), copy from matching-engine template
2. producer.go — Producer interface with Publish(topic string, event Event) error, ChannelProducer implementation using Go channels
3. topics.go — Topic constants: TopicTradeExecuted = "securities.trade.executed", TopicOrderCreated = "securities.order.created", TopicOrderCancelled = "securities.order.cancelled"
4. wiring.go — PublishTradeExecuted(producer, trade) and PublishOrderCreated(producer, order) helper functions that wrap data into Event envelope and publish

Then wire into the matching engine:
- Add a Producer field to the MatchingEngine struct
- After creating each trade in MatchOrder, call PublishTradeExecuted
- After submitting an order, call PublishOrderCreated
- Use nil-safe check: if producer != nil, publish (so tests without Kafka still work)

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for matching + trades + positions
tasks.description:
Write comprehensive unit tests for the matching engine, trade creation, and position management.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md and T2.md for what was implemented.

Create src/securities-service/internal/engine/engine_test.go:

1. TestMatchOrder_LimitBuySellCross — submit sell@100, then buy@100 → 1 trade at price 100
2. TestMatchOrder_LimitBuyAboveSell — submit sell@100, then buy@105 → trade at 100 (resting price)
3. TestMatchOrder_NoMatch — submit sell@100, then buy@95 → 0 trades, both orders resting
4. TestMatchOrder_PartialFill — submit sell 100@100, then buy 60@100 → trade qty 60, sell has 40 remaining (PARTIALLY_FILLED)
5. TestMatchOrder_MultipleFills — submit sell 30@100 + sell 30@101, then buy 50@101 → 2 trades (30@100 + 20@101), price-time priority
6. TestMatchOrder_MarketOrder — submit sell@100, then market buy qty 50 → trade at 100
7. TestMatchOrder_MarketOrderNoLiquidity — market buy with no resting sells → order stays pending (no match)
8. TestMatchOrder_PositionUpdate — after match, verify buyer position +qty, seller position -qty
9. TestMatchOrder_SelfTradeCheck — same participant on both sides → should still work (no STP in v1)
10. TestMatchOrder_HaltedInstrument — match on halted instrument → error

Also add to existing test files:
- src/securities-service/internal/store/store_test.go: TestTradeStore_Create, TestTradeStore_Get, TestTradeStore_ListByInstrument, TestPositionStore_GetOrCreate, TestPositionStore_Update

Target: 80%+ coverage on engine package.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
